steps.title: Choose the conversion direction
steps.content: Since $100$ centimeters equals $1$ meter, converting centimeters to meters means dividing by $100$. The number of meters should be smaller than the number of centimeters because meters are larger units.

steps.title: Convert to meters
steps.content: Divide the number of centimeters by $100$. $$4{,}600\div100=46$$ This keeps the unit direction correct: multiplying by $100$ would convert meters to centimeters instead. The answer is B.
